name: Basil Mashed Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan of salted water, bring the potatoes to a boil. Simmer for about 20 minutes or until tender.
2. Drain the potatoes.
3. Pass the potatoes through a ricer into a mixing bowl.
4. Meanwhile, in a small saucepan, combine the cream and butter. Bring to a boil and keep hot until the potatoes are cooked.
5. With a mixer or electric beater, whip the potatoes on slow speed, slowly drizzling in the cream mixture. Do not overmix.
6. Fold in the lemon juice, basil, ginger, and garlic.
7. Season with salt.
